title: Personal Exposure and Health Data Platform
text:
The Personal Exposure and Health (PEH) Data Platform is a secure infrastructure developed and managed by VITO to facilitate the collection, harmonized storage, and controlled access of pseudonymised or anonymised single measurement data from population studies.
The platform enables Supplying Data Controllers (SDCs) to deposit data, and Receiving Data Controllers (RDCs) to access approved subsets of PEH data for re-use.
The PEH Data Platform supports transparent data governance, ensures data protection and traceability, and provides operational services for data harmonisation, data processing, quality control, and access management.
In addition to the exchange of single measurement data the PEH Data Platform offers additional functionalities:

development and maintenance of FAIR data components
collection and publication of metadata
calculation and publication of summary statistics

This page serves as a central entry point to services, documentation, and resources.
